mapper.select: SELECT ro.*, su.username, su.real_name, c.car_name, c.car_no, c.price_per_day FROM rent_order ro LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON ro.user_id = su.id LEFT JOIN car c ON ro.car_id = c.id WHERE ro.id = #{id} AND ro.deleted = 0

SELECT ro.*, su.username, su.real_name, c.car_name, c.car_no, c.price_per_day FROM rent_order ro LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON ro.user_id = su.id LEFT JOIN car c ON ro.car_id = c.id WHERE ro.deleted = 0
AND ro.order_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{orderNo}, '%')
AND su.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{username}, '%')
AND c.car_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{carName}, '%')
AND ro.status = #{status}
ORDER BY ro.create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rent_order WHERE car_id = #{carId} AND deleted = 0 AND status IN (0, 1, 3)
